entry.title: Re: Configuring OAuth 2.0 between SAP C4C and SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Arun,

 

I did these steps last week several times, without success. Today I found your blog entry.

As IDP we are using Azure via SSO.

When you create the destination, can you check the destination? I am getting always an 401.

I dont find the place, where my mistake might be...

Jens

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano and everyone, 

My name is Quyen, and I'm from Vietnam. I'm currently a final-year female student majoring in Information Technology.

I want to express my genuine interest in this opportunity, it provides a pathway for us who looking to begin and advance our careers through SAP certification. I recently came across SAP and was fascinated by its innovative technology solutions. Also, the SAP Learning Hub is a valuable resource for communities to learn and enhance skills. I have already enrolled in some courses on the SAP Learning and am eager to complete the learning path.

I really hope to be the part of SAP Digital Skills Initiative program and I'm truly grateful for this chance.

Thank you for your consideration and this amazing opportunity.

Best Regards, 

Quyen

entry.title: Re: Dynamic programming fail: pass table TYPE cds as a parameter
entry.content:
Dear @Sandra_Rossi @ulrich_mhrke ,

as promised, I am coming back with the solution. The key was that, although it might seem suprising, it is possible in ABAP to type data from a variable when you use dynamic data type creation using CREATE DATA.

Situation: multiple programs calling the same generic class, passing a table name and data. The structure of tables and data differ program by program. The class displays the data in ALV (among others).

Problem:

  1. I need to declare receiving structure in the class as TYPE REF TO DATA, that is the only option. But assigning a reference or internal table to generic data type leads to an types mismatch error.
  2. I cannot use RTTS to type (describe) the internal table in the class, because the structure does not exist in dictionary. In fact, the source of data is a SELECT from a CDS entity view.
  3. I need to pass an internal table to CL_SALV_TABLE=>FACTORY CHANGING parameter, not a reference (field symbol).

Solution:

  1. Pass data and table name separately. We will end up playing with two field symbols, one for data, another for table.
  2. Wrap data to a reference and pass it to the constructor.
  3. Create a data reference for an internal table based on the provided name: CREATE DATA it_table TYPE TABLE OF (lv_name).
  4.  Create an intermediate work area that points to the dynamically created internal table: ASSIGN it_table->* TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_it_table>).
  5. Do the same with the data: ASSIGN data->* TO <fs_data>.
  6. Use APPEND LINES OF <fs_data> TO <fs_it_table> statement to copy data from the source to the dynamically created internal table.
  7. Simply dereference the table when passing it to ALV factory.
"Calling program

DATA: go_test TYPE REF TO z_fi_interface_dynamic,
      lr_data_ref TYPE REF TO data.

" Create a data reference for the internal table t_data_obs
GET REFERENCE OF t_data_obs INTO lr_data_ref.

  TRY.
    CREATE OBJECT go_test
        EXPORTING
            data = lr_data_ref " since t_data_obs is a standard internal table, we need to wrap it in a data reference
            name = 'ZFI_DATA_OBS'.
    CATCH cx_static_check INTO DATA(lx_error_static_test).
      MESSAGE lx_error_static_test->get_text( ) TYPE 'S' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
  ENDTRY.

  go_test->display_alv( ).
"Generic class

CLASS z_fi_interface_dynamic DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS: constructor
      IMPORTING
        VALUE(name) TYPE string
        VALUE(data) TYPE REF TO data,
      display_alv.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA: it_table TYPE REF TO data, " Generic data reference for dynamic typing
          lv_name  TYPE string,
          o_alv    TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS z_fi_interface_dynamic IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.
    lv_name = name.

    " Create a data reference for an internal table based on the provided name
    CREATE DATA it_table TYPE TABLE OF (lv_name).

    " Assign the data reference to a field symbol for dynamic access
    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <fs_it_table> TYPE STANDARD TABLE,
                   <fs_data>     TYPE STANDARD TABLE.

    ASSIGN it_table->* TO <fs_it_table>.
    ASSIGN data->* TO <fs_data>.

    " Make sure both field symbols are assigned before proceeding
    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      " Append the lines of the provided data to the newly created internal table
      APPEND LINES OF <fs_data> TO <fs_it_table>.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD display_alv.
    TRY.
        cl_salv_table=>factory(
          IMPORTING r_salv_table = o_alv
          CHANGING  t_table      = it_table->* ).

        " Display the ALV
        o_alv->display( ).

      CATCH cx_salv_msg INTO DATA(lx_salv_msg).
        MESSAGE lx_salv_msg->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David Chaviano,

My name is Hai, and I am working towards earning SAP certification to advance my career in the IT field. SAP certification is highly valued in the industry and will greatly enhance my skills and career prospects.

The voucher you are offering would be a tremendous help in making this goal more affordable and achievable. I would be very grateful for your consideration.

Thank you for your time and support.

Sincerely,
Hai

entry.title: How to send emails from Quality Notification Action Box
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am trying to trigger the sending of an email after selecting a task from the Action Box of a Quality Notification.

In particular, one of the tasks configured in the Action Box is "Send mail to supplier".

In the on-premise version of SAP S/4 Hana, when you define an activity in its customizing node, there is a field where you can associate the Function Module to trigger the sending of the mail when you select that specific task.

In SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud, that field is missing.

Therefore I ask you kindly how I can make sure that, following the selection of the task "Send mail to supplier", in the system screen the pop-up for sending an email opens.

Thank you all.

entry.title: Top 10 takeaways #SAPTeched 2024
entry.content:
1. Harnessing GenAI: The True Power Lies in Its Application

"You know how they say we can only access 20% of our brain? This lets you access all of it!" That's what Vernon Gant told Eddie Morra when he gave him the NZT-48 pill in the movie Limitless. Since OpenAI released ChatGPT in November 2022, large language models (LLMs) and other foundational models have gone mainstream—giving everyone their own version of NZT-48.

The question is: What do people bring to the table? Are they like Eddie, with a solid foundation in math and law that needs a boost? Or like Gennady, whose extortion skills got turbocharged? This analogy applies to companies as well.

SAP has a solid head start with its Business Technology Platform (BTP). At TechEd, SAP announced a slew of AI-enabled advancements that would have been impossible just 23 months ago.

Screen Capture of the Movie 'limitless' Released 2011

2. Embracing Innovation Through SAP BTP

As technology evolves, building new code or introducing innovative approaches depends on a strong platform foundation. SAP has fully embraced this with its Business Technology Platform (BTP). Originally launched as SAP Cloud Platform, BTP has evolved into a unified platform that consolidates essential components to help businesses scale, innovate, and thrive.

BTP's key pillars—application development, automation, integration, data and analytics, and AI—are driving innovation across industries, enabling companies to adapt to changing needs. With 27,000 live customers and over 2,800 partners, SAP BTP's success continues to grow, empowering businesses to stay competitive.

SAP BTP Portfolio 2024

3. AI Foundation on BTP: Relevant, Reliable, Responsible

"Relevant, Reliable, Responsible" is not just a buzzword for SAP.  SAP has taken significant actions to demonstrate this commitment.

  • Responsible: The AI Foundation model is expanding access to more LLMs. A highlight this year is Mistral Large 2, which will be hosted in SAP's own data centers rather than relying on external APIs, ensuring complete control over your data. Additionally, SAP has announced access to the latest LLMs from Aleph Alpha, Meta, and IBM.
  • Reliable: The SAP Gen AI Hub now offers various orchestration tools—such as data masking, grounding, and content filtering—to ensure that outputs from LLMs are trustworthy and less prone to hallucinations.
  • Relevant: SAP has built a comprehensive set of AI services, AI lifecycle management, and business data and content for AI, allowing seamless integration into SAP applications—all accessible via Joule.

SAP AI Foundation

4. Joule Updates: Your Trusted Co-Pilot

Joule, SAP's intelligent co-pilot, turns one this year! It will cover 80% of commonly used workflows and tasks in SAP, featuring 500 skills today with a goal to reach 1,200 by year-end, spanning HR, finance, sales, supply chain, and more.

New announcements include:

  • Multiple Language Support: Joule now supports multiple languages, expanding its accessibility.
  • Expanded Data Centers: Increased infrastructure to support Joule's growing capabilities.
  • Availability in SAP Mobile Start: Joule is now accessible in SAP Mobile Start.
  • Joule Studio in SAP Build: Enabling two million ABAP developers globally, Joule now supports ABAP developer capabilities in Eclipse.

Future Outlook:

Joule Agents: Specialized in specific domains like HR or Customer service, these agents leverage multi-agent systems, allowing businesses to create custom skills, including integration with other enterprise apps like ServiceNow via APIs. This expansion ensures Joule remains a powerful co-pilot, enabling seamless transactional, informational, and analytical interactions to boost business efficiency and automation.

Joule Agents

5. Unified Application Development Under SAP Build, Including ABAP

Two years ago, SAP introduced a low-code environment and last year added AI-powered code development for Java and JavaScript. This year, the latest SAP Build release includes ABAP Cloud, which comes with its own large language model trained on 25 million lines of ABAP code, offering immense power for the SAP ecosystem.

What does this mean? You can now extend your core S/4HANA systems using an AI-powered approach in ABAP Cloud in two ways:

  • On-Stack: Build custom extensions directly within the core system.
  • Side-by-Side: Develop modular, customizable extensions on SAP BTP.

The key is to maintain a clean core. The goal is to make all applications lifecycle-compliant, meaning they are built to last without requiring adaptations during innovation cycles. This applies to both private and public cloud. For private cloud, SAP Build supports RFC connectivity, enabling seamless third-party integration with S/4HANA. For public cloud, there is the SAP Build Extensibility Wizard, which helps key users and developers create both on-stack and side-by-side extensions within S/4HANA in an embedded experience.

ABAP Cloud in SAP Build

6. Data in the GenAI Age

In the era of Generative AI, creating intelligent applications requires careful data handling. While foundational models perform well, enterprise data needs precise management.

  • HANA Cloud Vector Engine: enables in-database vectorization with a proprietary SAP-specific text model, simplifying the creation of vector embeddings. This allows LLMs to provide more accurate, context-aware outputs for enterprise use. A notable example is Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), where the engine retrieves relevant business data to improve AI results.
  • Knowledge Graph Engine: This engine organizes data as interconnected facts, helping users navigate relationships and extract insights easily. In the GenAI space, knowledge graphs can power domain-specific question-answering systems, combining business data from manuals, documents, and records to generate precise, context-aware responses.
  • GenAI Toolkit for HANA Cloud: Similar to ABAP Cloud's AI-enabled code generation, this toolkit provides users access via Joule, allowing them to query datasets and receive results through AI-driven interactions.

SAP Knowledge Graph

7. Analytics in the GenAI age

Both SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud have received significant enhancements this year.

  • SAP Analytics Cloud now features SAP Analytics Cloud Compass, set to be generally available in Q1 2025. This feature enables business users to model complex risk scenarios using the Monte Carlo simulation method. With a user-friendly interface, non-technical users can perform real-time risk analysis without needing prior setup or technical expertise.
  • SAP Datasphere gets a boost with new embedded data lake capabilities, including the Integrated Object Store for storing large amounts of data, Spark Data Processing capabilities, and SQL Files for live access to data in the integrated object store without duplication. These features allow organizations of all sizes to implement a business data fabric in a simple, cost-efficient, and scalable way, powered by SAP HANA Cloud.

SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datashpere

8. SAP Integration Suite Enhancements

Many SAP customers leveraging SAP Integration Suite have experienced a significant return on investment—up to 345%, according to Forrester.

In the era of Generative AI, you can now optimize your existing integrations with AI-generated recommendations. This allows you to run script optimizations, modify connections, relaunch applications, and immediately observe the changes in system performance after the optimizations, providing a significant boost. (This feature will be available as part of SAP Integration Suite Premium Edition.)

Additionally, there's a new commercial offering: the SAP Integration Suite Starter Edition for SAP SuccessFactors and SAP GROW customers. This edition provides access to all pre-packaged SAP integrations, along with a fixed number of customizable integrations.

SAP Integration Suite

9. Business Transformation Management

LeanIX, Signavio, and WalkMe now form a cohesive block where customers need it most—business transformation management. With LeanIX, you can automatically discover your current application landscape. Signavio helps you discover and design your business processes, and WalkMe enables people to seamlessly navigate and adopt these processes, supporting activities such as employee onboarding, performance management, and job changes in SAP SuccessFactors.

SAP Business Transformation Management

10. AI Use Cases in Action Across Applications

A sample customer, "TeachIT Technologies," was used to demonstrate the power of Generative AI in various application spaces. The scenario: TeachIT Technologies, a mid-sized software implementation company, is facing challenges in project management, resource allocation, and international expansion.

  • Cloud ERP: Project managers track success criteria with GenAI-powered in-app extensibility. SAP BTP allows for custom application development, streamlining processes without manual coding.
  • UI and AI-Assisted Development: Developers use SAP Fiori Tools and LLMs to quickly transform sketches into functional applications, simplifying the development process (future-looking).
  • Global Expansion & Compliance: SAP Central Business Configuration (CBC) and GenAI automatically configure regional business processes for expansion, ensuring compliance with local regulations. AI in SAP’s compliance tools resolves tax errors like incorrect GST numbers.
  • Sales & Operations: SAP Sales Cloud and SuccessFactors use AI tools to help project managers manage teams, set goals, and track budgets, making decision-making easier.

Almost all applications, in one form or another, have their own 'NZT-48 pill'!

Please explore these in the newly launched SAP Business AI Features in SAP Discovery center.

https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/index.html

SAP Business AI Features

entry.title: Re: Change the file name of a Custom Form Template PDF (S...
entry.content:
Hi Dominik,

as far as I know, it is only possible via ABSL Coding and I am not sure if this matches your use case.

I once implemented a solution with a Custom BO using Attachment Folder BO. Therefor I added the created PDF as attachment to the UI, then you are able to set a custom docName.

entry.title: Re: Report/Dashboard tracking links between task,requirem...
entry.content: To add to Robin's comment, they have recently added Features under Indirect Assignment on the Solution Process Traceability Report. Adding it should give you a single pane of glass from Scope to Requirement, to User Story/Task, Feature, Test Case, Test Execution, and Defect (i.e. and End-to-End Traceability Report)

I really want to upgrade my knowledge of SAP technology and get my first job in SAP field soon.

Thank you for this opportunity.

entry.title: How to Migrate the Existing Workflow to SAP Business Process Automation
entry.content:
How to Migrate the Existing Workflow to BPA

Reason for the Topic: The goal is to outline the procedures and challenges we encountered, along with the solutions that successfully addressed those challenges, making it helpful for beginners eager to learn about BPA.

Pre-Requisites:

Step 1: Go to Subaccount → Go to Instances and Subscriptions → Click on "Create" and then select "SAP Build Process Automation Service" with the free plan. (This will add a BPA subscription.)

 

 

 

 

Next Steps: Creating an Instance for BPA Features

The next target is to create an instance to utilize the features of BPA for our requirements.

Steps:

  1. Go to Subaccount.
  2. Navigate to Instances and Subscriptions.
  3. Click on Create, then select Build Process Automation Service with the standard plan.
  4. Enter a name for the instance. (You can use this instance name in your processes or workflows to access BPA.)

 

 

This instance is essentially an object you’re creating to utilize the features of BPA.

I hope this clarifies why we are creating an instance for these services.

Step 2:

2.1  Go to Subaccount.

2.2  Navigate to Security.

2.3  Click on Users.

2.4Select Assign Role Collection and choose Process Automation Admin, Developer,and Participant.

 

 

 

 

You will now have access to utilize the BPA features.

Migrating the Existing Workflow to BPA

If your requirement is to move the existing workflow to BPA, here are the steps to follow:

Step 3:

Create a Dev Space and import the existing .mtar file into your project folder.

 

 

Steps:

  1. Modify the mta.yaml file as follows:

_schema-version: "3.2"
ID: FLOWID
version: 0.0.1
modules:
- name: Flow
  type: com.sap.application.content
  path: Flow
  requires:
    - name: BPA_Instance
      parameters:
        content-target: true
        service-key:
          config:
            deployUsageScenario: workflow
          name: spa-workflow-service-key
resources:
- name: BPA_Instance
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: process-automation-service
    service-plan: standard

 

 

Explanation of the mta.yaml File

In the mta.yaml file, BPA_Instance is the instance name that we created in Step 1.

 In the resources section, we specify the service name and the service plan that we used.

This configuration indicates that we are utilizing the BPA instance created, effectively migrating the workflow to BPA.

If the deployment is successful, you will see your deployed flow in the Monitor Workflows section.

 

 

Issues You May Face

Issue 1: Workflow is Not Visible as Deployed in Process Visibility

Resolution:

  • Go to the service instance and check whether the flow is bound to your instance. You can verify this in the service key.
  • Navigate to View Credentials in the instance. You should see the client ID and secret. If you don’t see the content endpoint, there may be an issue with the mta.yaml file.
  • Double-check the format of the mta.yaml file to ensure everything is correct.

 

To Monitor the Workflow in Process Visibility

Import the existing Process Visibility from Standard in the Projects section of BPA. After that, you can release and deploy the project.

Issues You May Face

Issue: You will not be able to see the workflow in BPA Process Visibility.

Resolution: First, check whether your workflow is visible in Monitor Workflows and if you can see your deployed workflow. If not, refer to the solution for Issue 1 and see if that resolves the problem.

Key Points Covered:

  • Migrating existing workflows to BPA.
  • Creating an instance in BPA.
  • Modifying the mta.yaml file.
  • Monitoring workflows.
  • Issues encountered and their solutions.

" Thanks for following along! Stay tuned for my next post, where I will dive into how to trigger workflow APIs from the service. Your journey with BPA continues!"

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

My name is Abdelrahman Atwany, and I am a SAP FI/CO consultant at ECC. I identify as someone who faces challenges in accessing equal opportunities due to my geographic location, as well as financial constraints that prevent me from affording a certification attempt for myself.

I have recently completed my first learning journey, Overview of Financials in SAP S/4HANA. This initiative by SAP has been an incredible opportunity for me, and I am eager to further enhance my skills through formal certification.

I would greatly appreciate your consideration of my request for a certification voucher, which would significantly impact my professional development.

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to your response.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

My name is Merlin, and I am from India. I would like to begin by expressing my gratitude to SAP for this initiative aimed at including individuals from generally underrepresented groups.

I hold a postgraduate degree in Finance and have 5 years of experience as a financial analyst. However, I took a break from my finance career two years ago. During this time, my growing interest in technology and the rapid advancements in the IT sector have inspired me to consider a career transition to IT. I believe that SAP provides the ideal opportunity to make this shift. As a woman seeking to transition from finance to IT, I am excited to qualify for the SAP Digital Skills initiative.


Thank you in advance .

Merlin Mathew

entry.title: HOW to create a custom LOGIN page in CAPM in sap BTP
entry.content:
Hello experts 

I am working on SAP BTP .  have created a full stack project  By using combinations of technologies such as CAPM(cloud application programming model), CDS(core data services),node JS ,FIORI ui5,additionaly  added authentication using xsuaa which secures my odata services   then deployed it over cloudfoundry  and it is working correctly.

i followed this tutorial    :     

Set Up Trust Between SAP Cloud Identity Services and SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment | SAP Tutorials 

and setup trust between cloud identity services and sap BTP ,cloudfoundry  environment . I understands this provides Authentication and single sign-on for users in the cloud.  

 

 After clicking on URL(Which is in my cloud foundry space) it redirects me to a Login page which is default login page of Idp(identity providers)  and after authenticating users ,xsuaa server and approuter exchanges token and then approuter, routes   on my  application welcome page (or any xml view in fiori ui5 which i have used for welcome page) .                                                                                                                                            This is the default login page of Idp  which i have faced:

Is it is possible that i can create my own custom login page instead of using default login page of Idp by keeping the functionality of approuter, and xsuaa server as same .

i explored sap community and got some usefull tutorials and resources which helps me in understanding the flow of login and working of browser, approuter, xsuaa server, idp  .                                                                      These resources are here:

  Guide for User Authentication and Authorization in... - SAP Community

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-application-router/ba-p/13393550

Could you please guide me on How to create custom login page for login by keeping the functionality of approuter and xsuaa server as same  .

Any recommendations, tutorial, or resources  specific to SAP BTP  would be greatly appreciated.

@gregorw

@thomas_jung 

@MSo 

 @AlexPJ  @RobertWaywell 

 @MioYasutake

 @qmacro

@gregorw

@Animatron56

@martinstenzig 

@Dinu 

@Bibhu 

@eshrinivasan 

@Dan_Wroblewski 

@David_Chaviano 

@acancelado 

@Senqi_Hu 

@DominikTylczyn

entry.title: Re: Consuming WebServices directly from ABAP
entry.content: Pretty good. A friendly suggestion: if you ever feel like extending this tutorial, you may want to show something about mapping values to the message and dealing with types mismatch. Also catching the response and error-handling gets handy for beginners. Configuring timeout and retry is also important. Actually, there is so much to write about... 😄

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

  • Women
  • Single parents
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life
  • People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves

Thank you,

Tre B

entry.title: My SAP journey begins ...
entry.content:
Hi David,

I’m Divya, a Chemical Engineer currently working in Trade Finance. As a woman aiming to break into the advanced tech industry, I’ve encountered my share of challenges. However, I see this opportunity to explore SAP as a pivotal step in overcoming those barriers and expanding my expertise. I’m confident that my background in engineering and finance will allow me to bring a unique perspective to SAP solutions, and I’m eager to learn and grow alongside this community. Thank you for this opportunity, and I look forward to connecting , contributing and getting certified in SAP Module.

Best regards,

Divya

entry.title: Re: BUSINESS PLACE IN SD DOCUMENT
entry.content:
Hello Santosh,

Thank you for your reply. With "Assign business place to plants" the business place is getting up in the Billing Document. But I want to generate the business place from "Assign business place to Sales office", is it possible to have it with this config for billing documents related to country India?

entry.title: Re: The Love-Hate Relationship with Networking
entry.content:
I love your take on networking! It’s refreshing and highlights something often overlooked: networking isn’t about quantity but quality. Building deeper, authentic connections has far more impact than trying to meet everyone. I also agree that it’s draining when you feel the pressure to "perform" or be someone you're not. It’s key to be yourself—genuine conversations are where real growth happens.

Stepping outside your comfort zone is necessary, but it doesn’t mean you need to sacrifice authenticity. In the end, it’s about finding those few meaningful connections that truly help your professional journey.

And ja I definitely have my fair share of awkward networking moments where once introduced myself to someone at an event, thinking we’d never met before, and I went on talking about how excited I was to connect. Halfway through, they politely reminded me we had already met at a previous conference and had even worked together on a small project! 😅 Safe to say, I felt pretty embarrassed, but we ended up laughing about it. Those moments definitely stay with you! 😊

entry.title: FORM 27EQ - TCS POSTING KEY
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am having an issue with the India TCS FORM 27EQ. While generating the "Remittance Challan - Customers", I am getting an error message saying, "No unpaid Tax item exists for given selection screen".

I am doing the TCS using Sales document with condition type "JGTC" which is assigned to withholding tax type Y6 and withholding tax code 66. TCS is getting debited in the sales document (Posting Key - 40). Can anyone tell me if it is the right entry or not? If it is not a correct entry, can someone please guide me how can I change the posting key in sap public cloud.

One more question, if I am doing the report with TCS Tax codes (JH - Final TCS and JI - Interim tax code) then the Remittance is getting created and the report is working fine. The TCS entry in FI document in this case is credited with posting key 50.

Can you please highlight what is the correct way to do this report. Is it via WHT tax types and tax codes or via TCS tax codes? 

I am looking forward for good answers and quick answers as this is something very urgent.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Exporting a simulation as a mp4
entry.content:
Hi Emmanuel,

Sorry, I don't have an answer for this issue but it is relatively common.  I suspect that it is something to do with Microsoft Codec used to generate the video file but I'm not certain.  I've checked the knowledge base and there is nothing on this topic so I recommend that you raise a support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-PRO and get support involved.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Turn on "Show Navigation Arrows" in all Book pages in...
entry.content:
Hi Shaun,

For you existing content, try adding modifying the setting on your Book Page templates.  If you haven't modified the corresponding setting on individual Book Pages, applying the setting to the Book Page templates should updating the corresponding setting on the individual Book Pages.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Updating the Value Categories for Maintenance Orders in S4HC Public Edition for Asset Management
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Value categories for asset management in S4HC Public Edition were configured during build with some cost elements group assigned then recently it was found out that no value categories for Subcontractor Cost and the cost element is not map to it resulting to no assigned value category in the maintenance order cost overview.

Questions:

1. What will happened if we will be adding new value category for the Subcontractor Cost and assigned the appropriate cost element group?

2. Will the old maintenance orders automatically updated with the new value category? I happened to see that in on-premise there will be need to run program.

Second, the value category Internal Activity where map to a cost element group but the actual cost element being use for time confirmation are different and by the way that is using an Integration to pass the cost to maintenance order. We are not using SAP time confirmation process. It resulting also be assigned to a blank value category summing up to the cost element for subcontractor cost.

Questions:

1. What will happened if we will be updating the value category Internal Activity and assigned the appropriate cost element group?

2. Will the old maintenance orders automatically updated with the updated value category/cost element group mapping? I happened to see that in on-premise there will be need to run program.

Appreciate your response on this.

entry.title: Updating the Value Categories for Maintenance Orders in S4HC Public Edition for Asset Management
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Value categories for asset management in S4HC Public Edition were configured during build with some cost elements group assigned then recently it was found out that no value categories for Subcontractor Cost and the cost element is not map to it resulting to no assigned value category in the maintenance order cost overview.

Questions:

1. What will happened if we will be adding new value category for the Subcontractor Cost and assigned the appropriate cost element group?

2. Will the old maintenance orders automatically updated with the new value category? I happened to see that in on-premise there will be need to run program.

Second, the value category Internal Activity where map to a cost element group but the actual cost element being use for time confirmation are different and by the way that is using an Integration to pass the cost to maintenance order. We are not using SAP time confirmation process. It resulting also be assigned to a blank value category summing up to the cost element for subcontractor cost.

Questions:

1. What will happened if we will be updating the value category Internal Activity and assigned the appropriate cost element group?

2. Will the old maintenance orders automatically updated with the updated value category/cost element group mapping? I happened to see that in on-premise there will be need to run program.

Appreciate your response on this.

My SAP Datasphere free-tier subscription has expired. I'm receiving below error.

How could I delete the instance of data sphere and recreate it?

Thanks.

Regards,

Ben

entry.title: Re: Validation in Rap Late Save Phase using CL_ABAP_BEHAV...
entry.content: Hi Mio Yasutake,

entry.title: Re: Validation in Rap Late Save Phase using CL_ABAP_BEHAV...

I created function to call coding block and called that function from "validation on save", it solved my problem

entry.title: Re: About F1 help (Performance assistant)

entry.title: Re: How to enable Performance Assistant
entry.content: hey

entry.title: Re: How to enable Performance Assistant
entry.content: click on help button -> option... a window with parameter f1 is displayed then select the second option: "in modal window"

entry.title: Re: About F1 help (Performance assistant)
entry.content: click on help button -> option... a window with parameter f1 is displayed then select the second option: "in modal window"

entry.title: Re: No customer master record exists for sold-to party VP199 in Return Order
entry.content: Hello Binoida - would you mind to share how you were able to resolve this issue? coz i configured a copy control for DR document type to CR Document type and i am getting the same error and not able to fix the issue. Appreciate it if you can give your inputs on the error resolution.

entry.title: Re: Mass Maintenance Order Printing Issue
entry.content: Thank you for the replay, Mrak1. just for your information that i was exploring this kind of issue with the expectation to find the solution without opening new posting like this but i didn't find it. the solution you give in this posting i already read as weel and not working in my case. The steps i was done are : 1. run tcode iw38 2. select desired maintenance order 3. go to Order --> Print Order 4.Input output device 5. Click Print Preview 6. The error show up

entry.title: Re: Consolidation of Investment in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear,

not every configuration step from OP is available in public Cloud. you can also refer to below SSCUI list for all configurations available https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Configuration/SSCUI_List_EN_XX.xlsm

the configuration path shown is largely related to COI activity based.

which according to official document, won't be available for new customers 2402 onwards.

 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/2f07a213a53f425eada2e096f6c6f1b0.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Reclassification Rules in Subsequent Period of Group...
entry.content:
Dear,

the COI in Group reporting is what would be regarded as "cost method' in consolidation term. meaning, GR does not revaluate investment in subsidiary from parent company.

This logic may need to be communicated to customers, which might got accustomed to "equity method".

the benefit of "equity method" is that investment in S include subsidiary's subsequent earnings.

this requirement can be handled by equity pick up in group reporting. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4ebf1502064b406c964b0911adfb3f01/5d45da82c7fd4108b69ae344511b49be.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA委外采购 - 委外供应商MRP区域
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA对于委外采购业务，标准方案是为委外供应商创建委外类型（03）的MRP区域。

一些客户并没有为委外供应商创建MRP区域，在正确维护了特殊采购类型（如30）虽然可以正常的生成委外采购申请，但无论从需求供给的查看（如MD04或者Manage material coverage等应用），还是原材料发给供应商后的供应商库存，都会与工厂级别的需求、供给及可用库存混在一起。

当您为委外供应商创建MRP区域后，该委外供应商相关的需求供给或者供应商库存，都会从工厂级别独立开来。且无需在物料主数据上分配每个供应商的MRP区域.

当您使用Subcontracting Cockpit将原材料库存发给供应商后(Movement type 541)，库存数量从工厂MRP区域转移到了供应商MRP区域。

这样，您就能很清晰的掌握委外采购过程中的材料的需求及库存移动情况。

当然，采购申请能根据供应商独立开来到相应的供应商MRP区域，前提是采购申请上维护了委外供应商。如果您希望MRP运行出来的采购申请自动带出供应商，您需要为该物料创建此供应商的货源清单，并指定与MRP相关。

——————————————————————————————————————————
**本博文中涉及到的截图均来源于SAP内部测试环境。

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud 如何批量上传AR, AP和AA的凭证
entry.content: Hi， for AA的财务凭证，可以通过API来批量处理，见如下链接 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/5bcca49998834de2b5533c36602e52a2/560ade3edf964466b10cc918c50cfa8e.html?locale=en-US 另外通过excel的方式上传AA凭证，在长期规划中，可以关注如下CIP https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/235507/?section=sectionComments

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud 如何批量上传AR, AP和AA的凭证
entry.content: Dear, for AR, AP, 可以尝试below apps Upload Supplier Invoices https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2452')/S33 Upload Customer Open Items https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4051')/S33

entry.title: Re: 交货单批次拆分过账后不能按照数量部分开票
entry.content: 目前不支持批次物料的拆分开票，已经向产品反馈过，目前还不确定什么时候能落地

entry.title: Re: Specific Identification of Costs in S4H Public Cloud...
entry.content: Dear, Please have a look at split valuation with valuation category X Automatic (Batch) https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/4032610758dc437089f0c28320eec93f/f15fac0ceaba41d1a78ce9230b9f8bc8.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: 交货单批次拆分过账后不能按照数量部分开票
entry.content:
Hi,

您好，参阅 出库交货的部分开票 ，当前（截至 2408 版本）部分开票功能不适用于带有批次的行项目。

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Maximum quantity limit for line items in sales orders
entry.content: Hi, One more question regarding your request: Are the detailed line items expected to be billed in the invoice, or just the main items?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

As an Vietnamese, I believe it's crucial for us to become more informed about the opportunities SAP offers, especially given our strong skillset. Unfortunately, due to the ongoing economic challenges, many of us are unable to seize these opportunities. Personally, I've been waiting for over a year to save enough for the S/4HANA SD certification. If I am given the opportunity, I would actively motivate other colleagues, particularly my peers in Vietnam, who are interested in working with SAP but need a little encouragement. Together, we can make a meaningful impact through initiatives like free certification programs. Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

Regards,

Vincent

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

My name is Dong. I'm a woman and a Accountant.
I have some knowledge in SAP Business One version 10 and I want to expand my knowledge in SAP BTP.

Thank you for considering my application!

Regards,

Dong Pham

entry.title: Re: can we generate bank payment file for Partial outgoin...
entry.content:
Dear Venkata Suri,

Thanks for your question. After talking to the experts, I can provide the following answer: The feature "generating bank payment file for partial payments" is not available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

You may request features on the Customer Influence Portal. We continuously review and prioritize feature requests based on customer feedback. 

Kind regards,

Sharon

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_FSCM_credit limit_custom approval workflow

Did you find any workaround to achieve your business requirement?

Thank You

entry.title: Re: How to connect to Analytic Model in Power BI
entry.content:
Look at the help of SAP

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/43509d67b8b84e66a30851e832f66911/4db6f5a329af44509ae422ad707877b2.html?locale=en-US



When using ODBC to 3rd Party the AM is not a supported Object, if you would use O-Data it would be possible:

You should overthink your own set limitation when you need to work with AM ;).

FYI:
I assume you still can see the AM because you can see / consume the relationale Table behind it, but not the Analytical Data:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/43509d67b8b84e66a30851e832f66911/7a453609c8694b029493e7d87e0de60a.html?locale=en-US&q=Relational+API#loio7a453609c8694b029493e7d87e0de60a__section_getting_started

entry.title: How to display invalid entry message in calculation view input paramter
entry.content:
Hi all,

We need to implement a feature that displays an “invalid entry” message when a user inputs invalid data into the input parameter of a calculation view created in Business application studio. Despite extensive research, I have not found any viable solutions. Could someone please advise if there is an available option to achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

Chethan

entry.title: How to prorate Accrual Leave - Annual Leave based on employee's hire date?
entry.content:
Our customer wants to prorate Accrual Leave - Annual Leave based on employee's hire date.

For example, if an employee's hire date is 2021-06-10, for the next year (2022), the employee's Accrual Leave will be prorated and since 2023, it will be granted as 15 and so on.

So for 2022, the value for accounting post will be 9 even though workdays (205 days) / 365 days * 15 = 8.4 since it should be Round Up.

And For workers who have worked continuously for more than 3 years, 1 day is added for every 2 years of continuous employment exceeding at least 1 year.

Up to 25 days can be added.

Could you please provide me any advice or referable documents or let me know how to configure this business rule in SF?

Referable screenshot would be appreciated and please refer the attached screenshot for the details.

Thank you.

 

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Barcode scanning in SAP MDK
entry.content: @SaranyaSampath Your question is not related to the topic covered in this blog post. I would suggest creating a new post for your query.

entry.title: class proxy->save_document_to_url does not work
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I only have 1 year of experience in ABAP. It's been 1 week I'm trying to figure out how to solved my problem, but still not found the right answer.
I created program to print Purchase Order document using BDS and not smartforms because I think it was more simple and everything runs smoothly. Until my user asks for the document to be automatically made into an email attachment in .pdf format. Here's my logic :

1. User run the program (PO.JPG for output example).
2. Button to send email 
2.1. call method save_document_to_url -> save to ftp server with .pdf format (nothing error message but the file was not created)
2.2. call method send email with .pdf attachment taken from the ftp server

My problem is point 2.1, I have no idea how to save the document with .pdf format. Can anyone help me solved my problem. I would really appreciate any help.

here's my code :

 

 

 

FORM f_insert_contents .

  DATA: lt_forms       TYPE soi_form_list,
        error          TYPE REF TO i_oi_error,
        lv_tgl         TYPE c LENGTH 15.

  CALL FUNCTION 'SAPGUI_PROGRESS_INDICATOR'
    EXPORTING
      text = 'Loading data, please wait...'.

  CALL METHOD o_oi->form_unprotect.
  CALL METHOD o_oi->form_get_data
    CHANGING
      data = lt_forms[].

  IF NOT lt_forms[] IS INITIAL.

    LOOP AT lt_forms INTO DATA(wa_form).

      CASE wa_form-name.
        WHEN '[VENDOR]'.
          DATA(lv_name) = |{ t_header-name1  } { t_header-name2 }|.
          wa_form-value = lv_name.
        WHEN '[ALAMAT_VENDOR]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-alamat.
        WHEN '[ALAMAT2]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-str_suppl1.
        WHEN '[ALAMAT3]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-str_suppl2.
        WHEN '[ALAMAT4]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-mc_city1.
        WHEN '[ALAMAT5]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-bezei.
        WHEN '[PO_NUMBER]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-ebeln.
        WHEN '[REV]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-revno.
        WHEN '[DATE]'.
          lv_tgl = |{ t_header-aedat+6(2) }.{ t_header-aedat+4(2) }.{ t_header-aedat(4) }|.
          wa_form-value = lv_tgl.
        WHEN '[PO_DESC]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-podesc.
        WHEN '[ATTN]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-verkf.
        WHEN '[FAX]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-telfx.
        WHEN '[EMAIL]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-smtp_addr.
        WHEN '[TOP]'.
          wa_form-value = lv_top.
        WHEN '[UOM]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-waers.
        WHEN '[SUB_TOTAL]'.
          WRITE t_header-subtotal DECIMALS 2 TO lv_subtotal CURRENCY t_header-waers. "Rev 3
          wa_form-value = lv_subtotal.
        WHEN '[PPN]'.
*          IF lt_mwskz EQ 'V1'.
          IF lt_mwskz2[] IS NOT INITIAL.
            wa_form-value = |PPN|. "Rev 4
          ELSE.
            wa_form-value = ' '.
          ENDIF.
        WHEN '[TOTAL_PPN]'.
*          IF lt_mwskz EQ 'V1'.
          IF lt_mwskz2[] IS NOT INITIAL.
            t_header-total_ppn = t_header-total_ppn / 10.
            WRITE t_header-total_ppn DECIMALS 2 TO lv_ppn CURRENCY t_header-waers. "Rev 3
            wa_form-value = lv_ppn.
          ELSE.
            wa_form-value = ' '.
          ENDIF.
        WHEN '[TOTAL]'.
          t_header-total = ( t_header-total_ppn * 10 ) + t_header-subtotal.
          WRITE t_header-total DECIMALS 2 TO lv_total CURRENCY t_header-waers. "Rev 3
          wa_form-value = lv_total.
        WHEN '[KETERANGAN]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-keterangan.
        WHEN '[REMARKS]'.
          wa_form-value = t_header-remarks.
      ENDCASE.

      MODIFY lt_forms FROM wa_form.
    ENDLOOP.

    CALL METHOD o_oi->form_set_data
      EXPORTING
        data = lt_forms[].
**
**    CALL METHOD o_oi->export_document
**      EXPORTING
**        file_name   = 'C:\Users\dio.mahardhika\Downloads\PDFPO.pdf'
**        prompt_user = abap_true.

  ENDIF.

  CALL METHOD o_oi->word_insert_table
    EXPORTING
      data_table      = t_result[]
      doctable_number = 1.

  DATA: numbytes TYPE i,
        url      TYPE bapiuri-uri.

*  user_info-user = 'sap.sri'.
*  user_info-password = 'itSRI1'.
  user_info-proxy = '10.xx.xx.xx:21'.
  user_info-proxyuser = 'sap.sri'.
  user_info-proxypassword = 'itSRI1'.
*  user_info-scrambled = 'X'.

  url = 'ftp://10.xx.xx.xx/t.pdf'.

  CALL METHOD o_oi->save_document_to_url
    EXPORTING
      url           = url
      user_info     = user_info
    CHANGING
      document_size = numbytes.

ENDFORM.

 

 

Please correct me if I made a mistake.

Regards,
Dio

entry.title: Re: To create a new wage for deduction of HRR which is not considered for housing perk calculation.
entry.content: Dear Experts,

entry.title: Re: BUSINESS PLACE IN SD DOCUMENT
entry.content: When you assign your business places to your sales offices, Ideally the system automatically derives the default business place when you post a tax-relevant document in Sales and Distribution (SD).

entry.title: Re: CPI: Exploring the hiden and hideous /Operations url
entry.content:
Thanks for a very fine blog.
Trying this we stumble into the following error

we are not sure if com.sap.it.nm.commands.node.TailTraceLogCommand needs to be POST or GET and what does the error message mean.
We tried to update External logging field as well and got the same error ?

<httpCommandProcessingDescription>
<errorKey>[Command][CommandProcessing][HandlerNotFound]</errorKey>
<messageInstance>
<message subsystemName="Command" subsystemPartName="CommandProcessing" messageId="HandlerNotFound" messageText="No handler registered for command ''{0}''."/>
<param xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">/com.sap.it.op.tmn.commands.dashboard.webui.IntegrationComponentSetReplicateLogLevelCommand</param>
</messageInstance>
</httpCommandProcessingDescription>

entry.title: Re: Configuration "Specify FS Items to be carried forward" is not accessible in Cloud syst
entry.content: Hello, If this is the case how can one allow the system to statistical FS item to be carried forward? Will it be through carryforward setting in the FS Item defination ?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano, 

Thank you for taking the time to read my message.

My name is Hieu. As a Management Information Systems student from Vietnam, I am eager to develop my career in SAP, a field that is highly valued worldwide. I believe that obtaining SAP certification through the SAP Digital Skills Initiative will not only enhance my technical skills but also open doors to better career opportunities in enterprise resource planning and technology solutions.

Being able to participate in this program and receive a voucher would be a life-changing opportunity for me. My ultimate goal is to contribute to organizations using SAP technologies to streamline business processes and drive innovation, especially in Vietnam's growing digital economy. I am fully committed to working hard and continuously improving my skills in this field.

I truly appreciate the opportunity that SAP is providing, and I hope to be able to take part in this amazing program. Your support and guidance would mean a lot to me in achieving my career aspirations.

Thank you once again for your consideration.

Best regards,
Hieu

entry.title: Re: Release strategy for Purchase Order not working
entry.content:
Hello,

I think it is because you left other characteristic blank in the class assignment. Release strategy will only work if you will encounter a blank values for those characteristic in your document. However what you have is a document with the other characteristics like purchasing organization or group. 

btw. there is a transaction which can help here: CL30N - Find Objects in Classes

You can test there various scenarios to understand the rel strategy behavior.

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Automation Pilot Q3 2024
entry.content:
In this blog post, we’ll dive into the latest updates and features in SAP Automation Pilot, designed to further enhance your automation capabilities and streamline operational workflows. Discover how these improvements can help you optimize and streamline your tasks for greater efficiency.

Content Generation Assistant - GlobalAvailability

We’re happy to announce that our Generative AI (GenAI) capability in SAP Automation Pilot reached General Availability globally on September 20th! With the Content Generation Assistant, users can now leverage AI to generate commands and workflows using natural language prompts, simplifying the automation process and minimizing manual effort.

 

For more information on this exciting update, you can check out the full blog post here.

Scheduled Executions Generation

With the latest updates, the Content Generation Assistant now supports generation of scheduled executions in SAP Automation Pilot with just a single prompt. The assistant automatically creates executions set to run at specific times, simplifying workflows and reducing manual tasks. This feature enhances flexibility and control, making operations more streamlined and easier to manage.

Remote Work Processor - Standalone Mode

The Remote Work Processor in SAP Automation Pilot can now operate in standalone mode. This lightweight agent allows users to securely make network requests in restricted environments, like private networks or on-premise systems with limited internet access. By delegating network requests to the agent, Automation Pilot can access internal resources, enabling automation in isolated or fenced-off systems. This enhancement significantly improves the tool's flexibility, making it easier to manage and automate tasks in hybrid and complex network setups.

UI Enhancements: Improved Dialogs and Expression Suggestions

The revamped Input and Output dialogs in our UI now feature a more organized structure, making it much easier to handle large JSON arrays or objects. Enhanced formatting options improve the readability of complex data, and users can hide specific fields for a more cleaner view.

 In addition to the updated Input and Output dialogs, we’ve also enhanced the Key Management Dialogs with a simplified, dynamic view. Depending on the type of data you’re working with, the dialog expands to display relevant fields, making it more flexible and user-friendly.

 

We’re also excited to announce that the Expression suggestions are now supported across all smart view text areas, further streamlining the user experience.

Content Connectors

With Content Connectors in SAP Automation Pilot, users can now back up their content directly to GitHub, either manually or on a scheduled six-hour basis. You can configure backups by selecting specific catalogues and applying tags to filter what gets backed up. Additionally, backups can be saved as individual files for each command and input or consolidated into a single file. The intuitive interface simplifies the process, making it easy to organize and safeguard your automation content efficiently.

New SAP Alert Notification service Events for Commands and Inputs

SAP Automation Pilot can now produce events for key actions on commands and inputs including:

  • Command Created, Updated, Deleted: Notifications for any creation, modification, or deletion of commands.
  • Input Created, Updated, Deleted: Real-time alerts when inputs are added, changed, or removed.

These new event notifications provide instant visibility into important updates, helping teams maintain greater control and transparency in shared environments. Whether it’s for improved collaboration or operational oversight, these alerts make monitoring changes more seamless and efficient.

Check out how to configure SAP Automation Pilot to produce these events here. 

New command in AI Core Catalog: GenerateGpt4OmniCompletion

Introducing a new command in the AI Core Catalog: GenerateGpt4OmniCompletion in SAP Automation Pilot. This command allows you to generate completions using GPT-4o for the SAP AI Core's generative AI hub.

Additionally, both the GenerateGpt4OmniCompletion and GenerateGpt35TurboCompletion commands now support response formatting, offering a cleaner and more structured view of the data, enhancing readability and usability.

New Example Scenario: Advanced Availability Check

The Advanced Availability Check monitors service availability and reports results to Dynatrace for SLA tracking and data visualization. In this example, the HTTP Bin service is used for testing, but it can be adapted for various services based on customer needs. Availability checks can also be scheduled at regular intervals using Automation Pilot’s Scheduled Executions feature. This provides a robust mechanism for continuous service monitoring, improving operational efficiency and reliability.

Check out the example in our Github repo with samples and try it. 

How to stay tuned to recent and upcoming innovations? 

  • What’s New in SAP Automation Pilot
  • SAP Road Map Explorer for SAP Automation Pilot.
  • Release Navigator for SAP Automation Pilot easing you the way to find product release related notes, blogposts, and webpages.
  • Public GitHub Automation Pilot sample use cases;

Do you know that you can display the image instead of an hyperlink?

What are these methods?

Hi Arunima,

Changes to Goal Plan Templates
Supported Elements and Attributes Comparison: Legacy and Latest

Yilin

Here is the snip from the Module: Introduction to SAP SignavioProcess Governance: Case Study (Optional)

 

 

 

Thanks !

entry.title: Connect to azure blob storage using SAS token in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi team,

We use BTP Object Store as a service in our applications and it generates SAS token-based credentials for the Blob container. Is there a way to connect to the Blob container using the SAS token in Datasphere? 

We have a few delta tables in the container and want to access them in Datasphere. Based on the help documentation and the connections UI, I can see that it only asks for the shared key but doesn't support any other type of credentials for the Blob container.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/df5a7c56ac21472c973f6fab341f3991.html

Any leads on this would help us proceed with the proof of concept we are working on. I really appreciate any help you can provide.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Use Poll-Enrich with SFTP Adapter
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am also using poll enrich with loop as I need to fetch multiple files from sftp at one run but I also need to send an email notification if no file found. But when I am using loop with poll enrich, it send email no file found at the last loop for every run even if have files. How to design the iflow in a way that it only send no file found message if there are no files in sftp. 

Thanks & regards,

Anuja

entry.title: Re: Creating a popup with depending fields
entry.content:
Hello Sebastian,

the solution is described in this blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-can-i-create-an-action-in-rap-with-mandatory-parameters/qaq-p/13789661.

Basically:

  1. Create a root abstract entity
  2. Now you can create a behaviour definition for it (and put the parameters to mandatory)
  3. Use the abstract entity as action parameter with additional statement "deep".

Regards,

Michael

entry.title: 如何批量查看销售订单VC选配项是否锁定
entry.content:
#S4 HANA Public Edtion
Hi,everyone.
我们用VC变式物料做销售订单，销售订单有很多选配项。但是有时候我们会做一些特征值的变更，就会导致之前已经下单的销售订单，VC选配项变成已锁定的状态。
我想请问有没有前台报表或者CDS可以提供给我们批量查看已经锁定的VC选配项对应的销售订单项目。

entry.title: Is there a way to load macros or similar automation scripts into SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Author?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to load macros or similar automation scripts into SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Author?
I am looking to automate the process of hiding or showing components based on a Bill of Materials (BOM). Specifically, I would like to automatically hide parts that are not included in a customer order. Any advice or documentation on how to achieve this would be appreciated.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Story Migration Best Practices
entry.content: Do we have any SAP Best Practices guide while moving from Classic SAC stories to new Unified Stories?

entry.title: Re: after unsuccessful authentication
entry.content:
@jerryjanda 

Hi Jerry!

In case you need another data point, I also got a big "Notification failed" message when logging in just now but the system seems to be "hallucinating" as everything still works as it should, including post this reply.

Cheers

Bärbel

entry.title: Proxy cannot be reached while adding subaccount in Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Recently, I had a issue in the cloud connector version 2.17.1

I have installed the Cloud connector in my personal laptop and trying to add the BTP sub account. It was giving error "Proxy Cannot be reached".

 

After analyzing the issue, I got to know that in this version it is trying to check the proxy in the system and it is failing.

 

Solution:  Uninstall the Version 2.17.1 and install the Version 2.16.2 for window and other operating systems.

The version is available on the SAP Site: https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#cloud

After installing this version, issue will solve.

 

Thanks.

Regards,

Rohit Gera

entry.title: sap fiori elemets application for the list report page
entry.content:
Hi All

Using Fiori elements list report page can we use the northwind OData service for demo use case instead of custom CDS views.

1. If Yes can we add more than one custom filter using guided development and where we can write the custom code to the filters.

i had tried using northwind OData service multiple filters are not possible with in the same entity by using the different entity set using guided development i am getting the error that

The existing controller file contents doesn't match the supported template. Copy and replace the function manually.  how to resolve it.

entry.title: 基于MTO产品的公司间销售退货流程介绍
entry.content:
总览

2408版本之前有个Note:3334657会提示，公司间退货流程2F4不支持E库存物料。

2408版本更新之后，此问题已经解决。客户可以使用基于MTO产品的公司间销售与公司间销售退货流程。

请先观看BLOG：基于MTO产品的公司间销售流程介绍 - SAP Community

流程介绍

1.参考2F4流程，创建公司间退货单，APP：Manage Customer Returns，参考公司间销售订单创建

行项目赔款方式，选择创建贷项凭证如下图：

注意：基于MTO产品的销售退货目前是不支持Replacement Product方式的，但是常规物料支持。

Save and Release退货单后，查看流程流中自动创建的退货交货单号和贷项凭证申请号

2.对上一步记录的退货交货单进行拣配和发货过账，APP：change outbound delivery

3.质检，APP：Enter Inspection Results - From Warehouse 

4.对第一步记录的贷项凭证申请创建贷项凭证，APP：Create Billing Documents

5.对第一步记录的退货交货单创建内部贷项凭证，凭证类型IG，APP：Create Billing Documents

检查IDOC是否创建成功：

6.查看供应商贷项凭证财务日记账，APP：Manage Journal Entries

前提配置

基于正向公司间销售配置完成后，需要对OPD增加一条配置：

 

感谢观看

entry.title: Re: class proxy->save_document_to_url does not work
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Sorry for the wrong question and thank you for your response, basically I using class I_OI_FORM you can check in SE24.

inside the cl_office_integration is :


1. form_protect means you can't edit the document when it show up and 
2. form_unprotect is the opposite.
3. form_get_data means get data from the application.
4. form_set_data means you put the data to the template that you upload in OAOR.
5. word_insert_table means put the data into table in template (word document).
6. export_document = I_OI_DOCUMENT_PROXY->save_as ( you do it manually because a pop up appears and you have to determine the name and save it in what folder, my need is to save it automatically in .pdf format without the pop up appearing )

For me, it's quite simple than smartforms.

entry.title: Re: Proxy cannot be reached while adding subaccount in Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hi Rohit.

entry.title: Setting Up New SAC tenant
entry.content: If we have to configure new SAC  tenant, Is there any SAP Best Practices guide to follow?

entry.title: Understanding RAS Server Functionality in Our Setup
entry.content:
I have a question regarding our current server setup and the potential addition of a RAS (Remote Access Server) server.
Given that we already have a server handling 250-300 concurrent users, I'm trying
to understand how we would utilize the new RAS server effectively. Specifically, I want to clarify whether we need to run the entire reporting workload on the RAS server or if it can be limited to just handling printing sessions.

Points to Consider:
1.
Current Server Load:
Our existing server is already managing a significant load due to the number of concurrent users and the associated database operations.
2. Purpose of the RAS Server:
If the primary function of the RAS server is to support remote a
ccess and handle printing sessions, can we configure it in such a way that it alleviates some of the reporting workload from our current server?
Would it be feasible to set the RAS server to only manage printing tasks while keeping the reporting process.

entry.title: Re: Release strategy for Purchase Order not working
entry.content: That was indeed the solution. Thank you so much!!

entry.title: Custom SAP BTP Workzone Maintaince mode
entry.content:
Hi expert,

I've a requirement to enable maintenance mode for the BTP User by period (user will be locked during period) And need to show a custom message to user to inform site is under maintenance

As far as i know for now we don't have maintenance mode for sap btp workzone services it still on idea of SAP
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/295127

So, could u give me advice or do we've other way (instead of custom in UI5 apps)

entry.title: Re: Crystal report print job limit
entry.content: I have a question regarding our current server setup and the potential addition of a RAS (Remote Access Server) server. Given that we already have a server handling 250-300 concurrent users, I'm trying to understand how we would utilize the new RAS server effectively. Specifically, I want to clarify whether we need to run the entire reporting workload on the RAS server or if it can be limited to just handling printing sessions. Points to Consider: 1. Current Server Load: Our existing server is already managing a significant load due to the number of concurrent users and the associated database operations. 2. Purpose of the RAS Server: If the primary function of the RAS server is to support remote a ccess and handle printing sessions, can we configure it in such a way that it alleviates some of the reporting workload from our current server? Would it be feasible to set the RAS server to only manage printing tasks while keeping the reporting proces

entry.title: Re: Avoid hard coding time periods in SAC Planning data actions
entry.content: Thanks a lot for this very usefull information. Would it be possible to make the "9" in the code also as a parameter to make it flexible ? In the next month it should then be "10". Many Thanks !

entry.title: Re: class proxy->save_document_to_url does not work
entry.content:
Word permits the export to PDF by either file > print > PDF printer (but make sure that all users have a PDF printer) or via file > export > create PDF/XPS document (all users should have Word 365).

You may run these commands via direct OLE commands (https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/how-to-use-doi-retain-excel-formula/m-p/12044504#M1968164).

No doubt that Word is more easy to develop than Smart Forms, but for the users it comes with many very big flaws (slow, doesn't work at all for users with the wrong Word configuration, nor in background).

entry.title: Re: class proxy->save_document_to_url does not work
entry.content: Thank you. Be careful to not use Answer if it's not a solution. Instead, use Replies > Comment.

entry.title: Re: Work Center Data Need
entry.content:
Hello @MCNG150600 

You can select routings by work center using Engineering Workbench (PP-BD), CEWB transaction.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski
